controls.control_objective: To ensure 08, 2025) to, all authorised persons madam/sir, master direction - reserve bank of india (non-resident investment in debt instruments) directions, 202
controls.control_description:
भारतीय įरज़वर् बैंक
www.rbi.org.in
RBI/2024-25/126
FMRD.FMD.No.10/14.01.006/2024-25 January 07, 2025
(Updated as on June 05, 2026)
(Updated as on April 10, 2026) (Updated as on February 06, 2026)
(Updated as on October 03, 2025)
(Updated as on August 12, 2025)
(Updated as on May 08, 2025)
To,
All Authorised Persons
Madam/Sir,
Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Non-resident Investment in Debt
Instruments) Directions, 2025
In exercise of the powers conferred under section 6, read with section 47 of the Foreign
Exchange Management Act, 1999, the Reserve Bank has issued the following
regulations to regulate non-resident investment in debt instruments in India:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 08, 2025) to, all authorised persons madam/sir, master direction - reserve bank of india (non-resident investment in debt instruments) directions, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure 03, 2000, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
FEMA 1/2000-RB dated May
03, 2000, as amended from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to 03, 2000, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure bring the contents of the master direction to the notice of their constituents
controls.control_description:
AD Category-I banks may bring the contents of the Master Direction to the notice of
their constituents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bring the contents of the master direction to the notice of their constituents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (non-resident investment in debt instruments) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
(i) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Non-resident Investment in Debt Instruments) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the master direction - reserve bank of india (non-resident investment in debt instruments) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable with immediate effect
controls.control_description: (ii) These Directions shall be applicable with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to all transactions by eligible non-residents in debt instruments
controls.control_description:
(iii) These Directions shall be applicable to all transactions by eligible non-residents
in debt instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to all transactions by eligible non-residents in debt instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure include all instruments specified in sub- paragraph - a of paragraph 1 of schedule 1 to foreign exchange management (debt instruments) regulations, 20
controls.control_description:
(a) "Corporate debt securities" shall include all instruments specified in sub-
paragraph - A of paragraph 1 of Schedule 1 to Foreign Exchange
Management (Debt Instruments) Regulations, 2019, other than
Government securities and municipal bonds as specified at clause (a) and
clause (k) of that sub-paragraph, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include all instruments specified in sub- paragraph - a of paragraph 1 of schedule 1 to foreign exchange management (debt instruments) regulations, 20

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the amount allotted to that fpi under the voluntary retention route
controls.control_description:
(b) "Committed Portfolio Size" (CPS) for a Foreign Portfolio Investor (FPI)
shall mean the amount allotted to that FPI under the Voluntary Retention
Route.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the amount allotted to that fpi under the voluntary retention route

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean non-convertible debentures/bonds, which are under default, either fully or partly, in the repayment of principal on maturity or principal instalm
controls.control_description:
(c) "Default bonds" shall mean Non-Convertible Debentures/bonds, which
are under default, either fully or partly, in the repayment of principal on
maturity or principal instalment in the case of amortising bond.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean non-convertible debentures/bonds, which are under default, either fully or partly, in the repayment of principal on maturity or principal instalm

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(a)(ii) of master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) directions, 202
controls.control_description:
(d) "Electronic Trading Platform (ETP)" shall have the same meaning as
assigned to it in Section 2(a)(ii) of Master Direction - Reserve Bank of
India (Electronic Trading Platforms) Directions, 2025 dated June 16, 2025,
as modified from time to time;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(a)(ii) of master direction - reserve bank of india (electronic trading platforms) directions, 202

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a person registered in accordance with the provisions of the securities and exchange board of india (foreign portfolio investors) regulations, 20
controls.control_description:
(e) "Foreign Portfolio Investor (FPI)" shall mean a person registered in
accordance with the provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of
India (Foreign Portfolio Investors) Regulations, 2019, as amended from
time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a person registered in accordance with the provisions of the securities and exchange board of india (foreign portfolio investors) regulations, 20

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a security as defined under section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006
controls.control_description:
(f) "Government security" shall mean a security as defined under section
2(f) of the Government Securities Act, 2006.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a security as defined under section 2(f) of the government securities act, 2006

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean violations that are, in the considered opinion of the custodians, unintentional, temporary in nature or have occurred on account of reasons beyon
controls.control_description:
(h) "Minor violations" shall mean violations that are, in the considered
opinion of the custodians, unintentional, temporary in nature or have
occurred on account of reasons beyond the control of FPIs, and in all cases
are corrected on detection.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean violations that are, in the considered opinion of the custodians, unintentional, temporary in nature or have occurred on account of reasons beyon

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean an fpi which is a multilateral financial institution in which government of india is a member
controls.control_description:
(i) "Multilateral Financial Institution", for the purpose of these Directions,
shall mean an FPI which is a Multilateral Financial Institution in which
Government of India is a member.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean an fpi which is a multilateral financial institution in which government of india is a member

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean a person resident outside india as defined under section 2(w) of fema, 1999
controls.control_description:
(j) "Non-resident" shall mean a person resident outside India as defined
under section 2(w) of FEMA, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean a person resident outside india as defined under section 2(w) of fema, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean an individual resident outside india who is a citizen of india
controls.control_description:
(ja) "Non-Resident Indian (NRI)" shall mean an individual resident outside
India who is a citizen of India.xxi
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean an individual resident outside india who is a citizen of india

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean markets where transactions are undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and shall include those executed on electronic trading platforms
controls.control_description:
(k) "Over-the-Counter (OTC) Markets" shall mean markets where
transactions are undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and
shall include those executed on electronic trading platforms (ETPs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean markets where transactions are undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and shall include those executed on electronic trading platforms

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(w) of fema, 1999
controls.control_description:
(l) "Person resident outside India" shall have the same meaning as
assigned to it under section 2(w) of FEMA, 1999.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under section 2(w) of fema, 1999

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it under the note (6) to item no
controls.control_description:
(m) "Real Estate Business" shall have the same meaning as assigned to it
under the note (6) to item no.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it under the note (6) to item no

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the securities contracts (regulations) act, 1956
controls.control_description:
(n) "Recognised stock exchange" shall have the same meaning as
assigned to it in section 2(f) of the Securities Contracts (Regulations) Act,
1956.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the securities contracts (regulations) act, 1956

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean 'investor group' as defined in regulation 22(3) of securities and exchange board of india (foreign portfolio investors) regulations, 2019
controls.control_description:
(o) "Related FPIs" shall mean 'investor group' as defined in Regulation 22(3)
of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Foreign Portfolio Investors)
Regulations, 2019.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean 'investor group' as defined in regulation 22(3) of securities and exchange board of india (foreign portfolio investors) regulations, 2019

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45u (c) of rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(p) "Repo" shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section 45U (c)
of RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45u (c) of rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean the time period that an fpi voluntarily commits for retaining the cps in india under the voluntary retention route
controls.control_description:
(q) "Retention Period" shall mean the time period that an FPI voluntarily
commits for retaining the CPS in India under the Voluntary Retention
Route.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean the time period that an fpi voluntarily commits for retaining the cps in india under the voluntary retention route

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45u (d) of rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(r) "Reverse Repo" shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section
45U (d) of RBI Act, 1934;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to it in section 45u (d) of rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure mean central government securities as periodically notified by the reserve bank for investment under the fully accessible route
controls.control_description:
(t) "Specified securities" shall mean Central Government securities as
periodically notified by the Reserve Bank for investment under the Fully
Accessible Route.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to mean central government securities as periodically notified by the reserve bank for investment under the fully accessible route

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the meaning assigned to them in fema, 1999, and the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(ii) Words and expressions used but not defined in these Directions, shall have
the meaning assigned to them in FEMA, 1999, and the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the meaning assigned to them in fema, 1999, and the rbi act, 1934

residents:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in terms of instructions stipulated in part - 5(b) of these directions
controls.control_description:
(ii) Investments by Non-Resident Indians in debt instruments shall be in terms of
instructions stipulated in Part - 5(B) of these Directions.xxii
Part - 2
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in terms of instructions stipulated in part - 5(b) of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in terms of the following:
controls.control_description: Investment in Government securities shall be in terms of the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in terms of the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned within the limit for investment stipulated for central government securities and state government securities, as applicable
controls.control_description:
(a) Reinvestment of coupon by FPIs in Central Government securities and
State Government securities shall be reckoned within the limit for
investment stipulated for Central Government securities and State
Government securities, as applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be reckoned within the limit for investment stipulated for central government securities and state government securities, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, reinvest coupons without any constraint
controls.control_description:
FPIs may, however, reinvest
coupons without any constraint.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, reinvest coupons without any constraint

controls.control_objective: To ensure reinvest the proceeds of any sale/redemption of central government securities and state government securities within two working days from the date of
controls.control_description:
(b) FPIs may reinvest the proceeds of any sale/redemption of Central
Government securities and State Government securities within two
working days from the date of sale/redemption (including the date of
sale/redemption) irrespective of the availability of limits in the category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to reinvest the proceeds of any sale/redemption of central government securities and state government securities within two working days from the date of

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to availability of limits for that category
controls.control_description:
Any reinvestment beyond two working days shall be subject to availability
of limits for that category.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to availability of limits for that category

controls.control_objective: To ensure monitor the utilisation of the investment limits for fpi investment in central government securities and state government securities [***] xxxii
controls.control_description:
(CCIL) shall monitor the utilisation of the
investment limits for FPI investment in Central Government securities and State
Government securities [***] xxxii.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to monitor the utilisation of the investment limits for fpi investment in central government securities and state government securities [***] xxxii

controls.control_objective: To ensure disseminate the utilisation levels of the aforesaid limits
controls.control_description:
CCIL shall disseminate the utilisation levels of
the aforesaid limits.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to disseminate the utilisation levels of the aforesaid limits

controls.control_objective: To ensure lie with the fpis and custodians
controls.control_description:
(vii) The primary responsibility of complying with all applicable limits for investment
in Government securities shall lie with the FPIs and custodians.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lie with the fpis and custodians

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in terms of the following:
controls.control_description: Investment in corporate debt securities shall be in terms of the following:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in terms of the following:

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest only in corporate debt securities with original/residual maturity of above one year
controls.control_description:
(i) Minimum residual maturity requirement: An FPI may invest only in corporate
debt securities with original/residual maturity of above one year.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest only in corporate debt securities with original/residual maturity of above one year

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest in:
controls.control_description: (ii) An FPI shall not invest in:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest in:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as per the sebi's master circular for mutual funds dated june 27, 2024, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
and
4 The categorization of debt mutual fund schemes and meaning of the expression 'Macaulay duration of the portfolio' shall be as per the SEBI's Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated June 27, 2024, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as per the sebi's master circular for mutual funds dated june 27, 2024, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure exceed 50 per cent of any issue of a corporate debt security
controls.control_description:
(iv) Issue-wise limit: Investment by any FPI, including investments by related FPIs,
shall not exceed 50 per cent of any issue of a corporate debt security.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to exceed 50 per cent of any issue of a corporate debt security

controls.control_objective: To ensure make further investments in that issue until this limit is complied with
controls.control_description:
31 dated June 15, 2018, the FPIs shall not make further investments in that issue
until this limit is complied with.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to make further investments in that issue until this limit is complied with

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to end- use restrictions on investments in real estate business, capital market and purchase of land
controls.control_description:
(vi) FPI investment in unlisted corporate debt securities in the form of non-convertible
debentures/bonds issued by public or private companies shall be subject to end-
use restrictions on investments in real estate business, capital market and
purchase of land.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to end- use restrictions on investments in real estate business, capital market and purchase of land

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest in 'to be listed' corporate debt securities
controls.control_description: (vii) An FPI may invest in 'to be listed' corporate debt securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest in 'to be listed' corporate debt securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately sell the corporate debt security to the issuer or to a third party
controls.control_description:
If the corporate debt
security is not listed within such period prescribed by Securities and Exchange
Board of India (SEBI) for the purpose, the FPI shall immediately sell the corporate
debt security to the issuer or to a third party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately sell the corporate debt security to the issuer or to a third party

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain a clause requiring the issuer to immediately redeem/buyback the corporate debt security in such an eventuality
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, the terms of offer
to an FPI investing in such securities shall contain a clause requiring the issuer to
immediately redeem/buyback the corporate debt security in such an eventuality.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain a clause requiring the issuer to immediately redeem/buyback the corporate debt security in such an eventuality

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to investments by fpis in the following securities:
controls.control_description:
(a) The minimum residual maturity requirement [***] iii and the issue-wise limit shall
not apply to investments by FPIs in the following securities:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to investments by fpis in the following securities:

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to investments by fpis in the following securities:
controls.control_description:
(b) The minimum residual maturity requirement shall not apply to investments by
FPIs in the following securities:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to investments by fpis in the following securities:

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to investments in corporate debt securities by multilateral financial institutions
controls.control_description:
(c) The issue-wise limit shall not apply to investments in corporate debt securities
by multilateral financial institutions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to investments in corporate debt securities by multilateral financial institutions

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to the debenture trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial owners from whom it is acquiring the bonds
controls.control_description:
(ix) An FPI which proposes to acquire default bonds shall disclose to the Debenture
Trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial owners
from whom it is acquiring the bonds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to the debenture trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial owners from whom it is acquiring the bonds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be monitored by the depositories registered with sebi in accordance with the applicable regulations/directions/guidelines issued by sebi from time to
controls.control_description:
(x) Utilization of FPI investment limits in corporate debt securities shall be monitored
by the depositories registered with SEBI in accordance with the applicable
regulations/directions/guidelines issued by SEBI from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be monitored by the depositories registered with sebi in accordance with the applicable regulations/directions/guidelines issued by sebi from time to

controls.control_objective: To ensure lie with the fpis and custodians
controls.control_description:
(xi) The primary responsibility of complying with all applicable limits for investment in
corporate debt securities shall lie with the FPIs and custodians.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to lie with the fpis and custodians

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted in etfs that invest only in debt instruments
controls.control_description:
However, investments shall be permitted in ETFs that invest only in debt
instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted in etfs that invest only in debt instruments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to end-use restriction on investment in real estate business, capital market and purchase of land
controls.control_description:
(a) FPI investment in unlisted corporate debt securities in the form of non-
convertible debentures/bonds issued by public or private companies shall be
subject to end-use restriction on investment in real estate business, capital
market and purchase of land.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to end-use restriction on investment in real estate business, capital market and purchase of land

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest in 'to be listed' corporate debt securities
controls.control_description: (b) An FPI may invest in 'to be listed' corporate debt securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest in 'to be listed' corporate debt securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure immediately sell the corporate debt security to the issuer or to a third party
controls.control_description:
If the corporate debt
security is not listed within such period prescribed by SEBI for the purpose, the
FPI shall immediately sell the corporate debt security to the issuer or to a third
party.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to immediately sell the corporate debt security to the issuer or to a third party

controls.control_objective: To ensure contain a clause requiring the issuer to immediately redeem/buyback the corporate debt security in such an eventuality
controls.control_description:
For this purpose, the terms of offer to an FPI investing in such securities
shall contain a clause requiring the issuer to immediately redeem/buyback the
corporate debt security in such an eventuality.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contain a clause requiring the issuer to immediately redeem/buyback the corporate debt security in such an eventuality

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to the debenture trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial owners from whom it is acquiring the bonds
controls.control_description:
(c) An FPI which proposes to acquire default bonds shall disclose to the Debenture
Trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial
owners from whom it is acquiring the bonds.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to the debenture trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial owners from whom it is acquiring the bonds

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the investment limit stipulated for fpi investments under the general route as specified in paragraph
controls.control_description:
Investment limit: Investments under VRR shall be subject to the investment limit
stipulated for FPI investments under the General Route as specified in paragraph
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be subject to the investment limit stipulated for fpi investments under the general route as specified in paragraph

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made on tap and allotted on a 'first come, first served' basis or through an auction mechanism as detailed in annex - 2
controls.control_description:
(a) Allocation of investment amount to FPIs under this Route shall be made on tap
and allotted on a 'first come, first served' basis or through an auction mechanism
as detailed in Annex - 2.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made on tap and allotted on a 'first come, first served' basis or through an auction mechanism as detailed in annex - 2

controls.control_objective: To ensure be announced by the reserve bank for each tranche
controls.control_description:
The mode of allotment shall be announced by the
Reserve Bank for each tranche.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be announced by the reserve bank for each tranche

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply for investment limit online to ccil through their respective custodians
controls.control_description:
(b) For allocation of investment amounts on tap, an FPI may apply for investment
limit online to CCIL through their respective custodians.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to apply for investment limit online to ccil through their respective custodians

controls.control_objective: To ensure be 50 per cent of the amount offered for each allotment by tap or through auction, in case of demand for more than 100 per cent of amount offered
controls.control_description:
(c) The maximum investment limit which can be allotted to an FPI (including its
related FPIs) shall be 50 per cent of the amount offered for each allotment by tap
or through auction, in case of demand for more than 100 per cent of amount
offered.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be 50 per cent of the amount offered for each allotment by tap or through auction, in case of demand for more than 100 per cent of amount offered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be three years or as announced by the reserve bank for each tranche
controls.control_description:
(ii) Retention period: The minimum retention period shall be three years or as
announced by the Reserve Bank for each tranche.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be three years or as announced by the reserve bank for each tranche

controls.control_objective: To ensure commence from the date of allotment of limit
controls.control_description:
The retention period shall
commence from the date of allotment of limit.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to commence from the date of allotment of limit

controls.control_objective: To ensure for an fpi that has availed additional time to invest in terms of the a
controls.control_description:
Provided that for an FPI that has availed additional time to invest in terms of the
A.P.(DIR Series) Circular No.32 dated May 22, 2020, the retention period for the
investments (committed by it at the time of allotment of investment limit) would be
reset to commence from the date that the FPI invests 75 per cent of the
Committed Portfolio Size (CPS).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to for an fpi that has availed additional time to invest in terms of the a

controls.control_objective: To ensure invest at least 75 per cent of its cps within three months from the date of allotment and remain invested to a minimum extent of 75 per cent of the cp
controls.control_description:
(i) An FPI shall invest at least 75 per cent of its CPS within three months from the
date of allotment and remain invested to a minimum extent of 75 per cent of the
CPS at all times during the committed retention period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to invest at least 75 per cent of its cps within three months from the date of allotment and remain invested to a minimum extent of 75 per cent of the cp

controls.control_objective: To ensure include cash holdings in the rupee accounts used for the vrr
controls.control_description:
For this purpose,
investment shall include cash holdings in the Rupee accounts used for the VRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include cash holdings in the rupee accounts used for the vrr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhered to on an end-of-day basis
controls.control_description: The required investment amount shall be adhered to on an end-of-day basis.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adhered to on an end-of-day basis

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at its discretion, transfer its investments made under the general route
controls.control_description:
(ii) An FPI may, at its discretion, transfer its investments made under the General
Route, if any, to the VRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , at its discretion, transfer its investments made under the general route

controls.control_objective: To ensure permit any repatriation from the cash accounts of an fpi
controls.control_description:
(iii) Custodians shall not permit any repatriation from the cash accounts of an FPI, if
such transaction leads to the FPI's assets falling below the minimum stipulated
level of 75 per cent of CPS during the retention period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to permit any repatriation from the cash accounts of an fpi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reinvested at the discretion of the fpi even if such investments are in excess of the cps
controls.control_description:
(iv) Income from investments through the VRR may be reinvested at the discretion of
the FPI even if such investments are in excess of the CPS.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reinvested at the discretion of the fpi even if such investments are in excess of the cps

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to any minimum residual maturity requirement [***] iv or issue-wise limits applicable to corporate debt securities as specified for fpi inv
controls.control_description:
(v) Investments made through the VRR shall not be subject to any minimum residual
maturity requirement [***] iv or issue-wise limits applicable to corporate debt
securities as specified for FPI investment under the General Route.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to any minimum residual maturity requirement [***] iv or issue-wise limits applicable to corporate debt securities as specified for fpi inv

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at the end of the retention period, opt to:
controls.control_description: (i) An FPI may, at the end of the retention period, opt to:

controls.control_objective: To ensure convey this decision to its custodian before the end of the committed retention period
controls.control_description:
In such a
case, the FPI shall convey this decision to its custodian before the end of the
committed retention period.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to convey this decision to its custodian before the end of the committed retention period

controls.control_objective: To ensure report the same to ccil
controls.control_description: The custodian, in turn, shall report the same to CCIL.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report the same to ccil

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so by selling its investments to another fpi or fpis
controls.control_description:
(ii) An FPI desiring to exit its investments, fully or partly, under the VRR prior to the
end of the retention period may do so by selling its investments to another FPI or
FPIs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so by selling its investments to another fpi or fpis

controls.control_objective: To ensure abide by all the terms and conditions applicable to the selling fpi under the vrr
controls.control_description:
The FPI (or FPIs) buying such investment shall abide by all the terms and
conditions applicable to the selling FPI under the VRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to abide by all the terms and conditions applicable to the selling fpi under the vrr

controls.control_objective: To ensure opt to liquidate its portfolio fully or partly and exit after the end of the said minimum retention period
controls.control_description:
(iii) An FPI that had availed investment limit for a retention period exceeding the
minimum retention period stipulated in terms of paragraph 5.3(ii) of these Directions
may opt to liquidate its portfolio fully or partly and exit after the end of the said
minimum retention period.xx
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to opt to liquidate its portfolio fully or partly and exit after the end of the said minimum retention period

controls.control_objective: To ensure open one or more separate special non-resident rupee (snrr) account(s) for investments through the vrr
controls.control_description:
An FPI shall open one or more separate Special Non-Resident Rupee (SNRR)
account(s) for investments through the VRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open one or more separate special non-resident rupee (snrr) account(s) for investments through the vrr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reflected in such account(s)
controls.control_description:
All fund flows relating to investment
through the VRR shall be reflected in such account(s).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reflected in such account(s)

controls.control_objective: To ensure open a separate security account for holding debt securities under the vrr
controls.control_description:
An FPI may open a
separate security account for holding debt securities under the VRR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to open a separate security account for holding debt securities under the vrr

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the responsibility of both the fpi and its custodian
controls.control_description:
Utilisation of limits and adherence to other requirements of the VRR shall be the
responsibility of both the FPI and its custodian.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the responsibility of both the fpi and its custodian

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that appropriate legal documentation with fpis are in place to enable the custodians to ensure that the directions under the vrr are adhered to
controls.control_description:
Custodians shall ensure that
appropriate legal documentation with FPIs are in place to enable the custodians
to ensure that the Directions under the VRR are adhered to.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that appropriate legal documentation with fpis are in place to enable the custodians to ensure that the directions under the vrr are adhered to

Notification No.

and any other security that the Reserve Bank may notify in this

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to any investment limit or macro-prudential controls as applicable for investments in government securities through the general route
controls.control_description:
FPI investment in "specified securities" under this Route shall not be subject to
any investment limit or macro-prudential controls as applicable for investments in
Government securities through the General Route.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be subject to any investment limit or macro-prudential controls as applicable for investments in government securities through the general route

controls.control_description:

controls.control_objective: To ensure participate in the government securities market, both primary and secondary
controls.control_description:
(i) An FPI may participate in the Government securities market, both primary and
secondary.

controls.control_objective: To ensure trade in the secondary market for government securities through the primary members of nds-om, including by using the nds-om web module
controls.control_description:
(ii) An FPI may trade in the secondary market for Government securities through the
primary members of NDS-OM, including by using the NDS-OM Web module.

controls.control_objective: To ensure lend to fpis in accordance with their credit risk management frameworks for the purpose of placing margins with ccil for the settlement of government
controls.control_description:

Banks may lend to FPIs in accordance with their credit risk management

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported to the nds-om platform on the trade date within three hours after the close of trading hours for the government securities market and in a
controls.control_description:
(iv) Reporting of transactions in Government securities: All OTC trades in
Government securities undertaken by FPIs (except transactions undertaken
using the NDS-OM web module) shall be reported to the NDS-OM platform on
the trade date within three hours after the close of trading hours for the
Government securities market and in accordance with the operational guidance
issued by Clearcorp Dealing Systems (India) Ltd in this regard.

controls.control_objective: To ensure call for information or statement or seek any clarification, which in the opinion of the reserve bank is relevant, from non-residents, custodians, or
controls.control_description:
Obligation to provide information sought by the Reserve Bank
The Reserve Bank may call for information or statement or seek any clarification,
which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant, from non-residents, custodians,
or any other entity involved with non-resident investment in debt instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to call for information or statement or seek any clarification, which in the opinion of the reserve bank is relevant, from non-residents, custodians, or

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish such information, statement or clarification within such time, and in the manner, as specified by the reserve bank, from time to time
controls.control_description:
Such
persons, agencies and participants shall furnish such information, statement or
clarification within such time, and in the manner, as specified by the Reserve Bank,
from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish such information, statement or clarification within such time, and in the manner, as specified by the reserve bank, from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure publish any anonymised data related to transactions by non-residents in debt instruments
controls.control_description:
Dissemination of data
The Reserve Bank or any other person authorised by the Reserve Bank, may publish
any anonymised data related to transactions by non-residents in debt instruments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to publish any anonymised data related to transactions by non-residents in debt instruments

controls.control_description:
(i) Any transaction in breach of applicable investment limit or macro-prudential
control shall not be accepted.

controls.control_description:
Any transaction/investment in breach of applicable
investment limit shall need to be reversed.

controls.control_description: (ii) Any violation by FPIs shall be subject to regulatory action as determined by SEBI.

controls.control_objective: To ensure report to sebi all violations that do not fall within the ambit of minor violations as well as minor violations that have not been regularised within
controls.control_description:
Custodians shall report to SEBI all violations
that do not fall within the ambit of minor violations as well as minor violations that
have not been regularised within the time period permitted as above.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by all other applicable provisions of fema, 1999, and the rules, regulations and directions issued thereunder by the reserve bank from time to time
controls.control_description:
Investments by eligible investors under these Directions shall be governed by all
other applicable provisions of FEMA, 1999, and the rules, regulations and
directions issued thereunder by the Reserve Bank from time to time, unless
otherwise specified.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as under: a
controls.control_description:
Annex - 2
Auction process for allocation of investment amount under VRR
The auction process for allotment of investment amounts under the VRR shall be as
under:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as under: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the minimum retention period applicable for that auction
controls.control_description:
An FPI shall bid two variables - the amount it proposes to invest and the
retention period of that investment, which shall not be less than the minimum
retention period applicable for that auction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than the minimum retention period applicable for that auction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be the retention period bid in the auction
controls.control_description:
The criterion for allocation under each auction shall be the retention period bid
in the auction.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be the retention period bid in the auction

controls.control_objective: To ensure be as below: i
controls.control_description:
Allotment at margin (i.e., at the lowest retention period accepted), in case the
amount bid at margin is more than the amount available for allotment, shall be
as below:
i.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be as below: i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be allocated partially such that the total acceptance amount matches the auction amount
controls.control_description:
The marginal bid shall be allocated partially such that the total
acceptance amount matches the auction amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be allocated partially such that the total acceptance amount matches the auction amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to the bid with the largest amount, and then in descending order of amount bid until the acceptance amount matches the auction amount
controls.control_description:
In case there are more than one marginal bids, allocation shall be made
to the bid with the largest amount, and then in descending order of
amount bid until the acceptance amount matches the auction amount.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to the bid with the largest amount, and then in descending order of amount bid until the acceptance amount matches the auction amount

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned for each bid separately
controls.control_description:
If an FPI has been allotted multiple bids in an auction, the CPS shall be
reckoned for each bid separately.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned for each bid separately
